title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
description: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.
content:
A superyacht linked to one of Russian President Vladimir Putin's key allies has sailed through the Strait of Hormuz, despite the ongoing blockade of the critical shipping channel.

title: Political violence jolts the US again
description: In modern America, it seems violence of this kind has become an ever-present storm that can strike anywhere and at any moment.
content:
For many in the ballroom at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner on Saturday night, the scene was painfully familiar. Shots fired, confusion and panic, and a sense that the normal order of things had been violently interrupted.

title: Suspect charged with attempted assassination of Trump at correspondents' dinner
description: Investigators say the 31-year-old California man wanted to kill as many high-level officials as possible.
content:
A California man has been charged with attempting to assassinate US President Donald Trump in an incident that has sparked a White House security review.

title: King Charles and Queen Camilla meet Trump at White House
description: The royals have officially started the first US state visit by a reigning UK monarch in nearly 20 years.
content:
King and Queen chat with president and first lady in front of Trump assassination-attempt painting

title: Starmer tells MPs to ‘fight together’ before critical day for his premiership
description: The prime minister faces a standards investigation over Mandelson affair and testimony from Morgan McSweeney
content:
Keir Starmer has told Labour MPs to “stick together and fight together” as ministers launched a massive operation to shore up his fragile position before a critical day for his premiership.
